## Claude Review - Test Scope

[HIGH] contracts/src/foo.cairo:42 - reentrancy: external call before state update
Impact: an attacker could re-enter and drain.
Fix: move state update before the call.

[LOW] contracts/src/bar.cairo:10 - missing comment
Impact: minor readability.
Fix: add a doc comment.

Summary: 0 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH, 0 MEDIUM, 1 LOW, 0 INFO
